recap: Migrated 4 sysinfo scripts to autoload system/ dir, converted to err_return convention, preserved symlink
Created sys-cpu, sys-ram, sys-swap autoload functions with --reply flag support and ▮-separated output
Created sys-temperature, sys-fans, sys-battery autoload functions with hwmon discovery by name, graceful degradation, and --reply flag
Created vitals autoload function: calls all sys-* helpers with --reply, color-codes values by threshold, aligned column output
